values.description: Aeterna HTTP API via nginx ingress with TLS — update to your deployment URL
Aeterna Prometheus metrics (via kubectl port-forward svc/aeterna 9090:9090 — not exposed via ingress)
OPAL Server (via kubectl port-forward svc/aeterna-opal-server 7002:7002 — not exposed via ingress)
Cedar Agent (via kubectl port-forward svc/aeterna-cedar-agent 8180:8180 — not exposed via ingress)
Kubernetes cluster context — set to your cluster name

GitHub OAuth access token (from device code flow). Required for auth test folder 13. Obtain via: POST https://github.com/login/device/code with client_id, then poll https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token
